items.title: S01E01 - Episode 1
items.summary: In 2020, following a civil war, Britain is ruled by the Knights of God. But plans are being made for a rebellion — with a young man being singled out for a mysterious, but vital, role.

infolabels.title: Episode 1
infolabels.plot: In 2020, following a civil war, Britain is ruled by the Knights of God. But plans are being made for a rebellion — with a young man being singled out for a mysterious, but vital, role.

items.title: S01E02 - Episode 2
items.summary: Gervase and Julia learn more about the Order and each other. Mordrin is determined to find the leader of the Resistance and has mysterious plans for Gervase — but will be be foiled by Julia's plan?

infolabels.title: Episode 2
infolabels.plot: Gervase and Julia learn more about the Order and each other. Mordrin is determined to find the leader of the Resistance and has mysterious plans for Gervase — but will be be foiled by Julia's plan?

items.title: S01E03 - Episode 3
items.summary: Julia's fate seems certain as Mordrin steps up the pressure. Gervase's love for her is challenged and he has to make a horrifying decision.

infolabels.title: Episode 3
infolabels.plot: Julia's fate seems certain as Mordrin steps up the pressure. Gervase's love for her is challenged and he has to make a horrifying decision.

items.title: S01E04 - Episode 4
items.summary: Gervase joins the Order and Mordrin sets him to his mission. However, Hugo has other plans for the boy.

infolabels.title: Episode 4
infolabels.plot: Gervase joins the Order and Mordrin sets him to his mission. However, Hugo has other plans for the boy.

items.title: S01E05 - Episode 5
items.summary: Hugo's plans develop as Mordrin's promise to Gervase is broken.

infolabels.title: Episode 5
infolabels.plot: Hugo's plans develop as Mordrin's promise to Gervase is broken.

items.title: S01E06 - Episode 6
items.summary: Hugo sends Williams on a mission, as Mordrin is persuaded to let Gervase have his own way.

infolabels.title: Episode 6
infolabels.plot: Hugo sends Williams on a mission, as Mordrin is persuaded to let Gervase have his own way.

items.title: S01E07 - Episode 7
items.summary: Julia and Gervase have little time to enjoy being united, as Hugo's henchmen seen to complete their mission. Colley is determined to get revenge for Nell's death.

infolabels.title: Episode 7
infolabels.plot: Julia and Gervase have little time to enjoy being united, as Hugo's henchmen seen to complete their mission. Colley is determined to get revenge for Nell's death.

items.title: S01E08 - Episode 8
items.summary: Gervase and Julia are imprisoned in the Wasteland headquarters.

infolabels.title: Episode 8
infolabels.plot: Gervase and Julia are imprisoned in the Wasteland headquarters.

items.title: S01E09 - Episode 9
items.summary: Hugo sets in motion a plan to be rid of Mordrin while Owen and Beth plead with Arthur to release Gervase.

infolabels.title: Episode 9
infolabels.plot: Hugo sets in motion a plan to be rid of Mordrin while Owen and Beth plead with Arthur to release Gervase.

items.title: S01E10 - Episode 10
items.summary: Julia and Gervase attempt to survive with both sides seeking to destroy them. Meanwhile, Hugo arranges to miss his trial.

infolabels.title: Episode 10
infolabels.plot: Julia and Gervase attempt to survive with both sides seeking to destroy them. Meanwhile, Hugo arranges to miss his trial.

items.title: S01E11 - Episode 11
items.summary: Mordrin rejects even his friends in attempting to run his regime single-handed. Julia and Gervase learn that their quest is not over and the people of Britain depend on them.

infolabels.title: Episode 11
infolabels.plot: Mordrin rejects even his friends in attempting to run his regime single-handed. Julia and Gervase learn that their quest is not over and the people of Britain depend on them.

items.title: S01E12 - Episode 12
items.summary: Hugo and Mordrin are set on a collision course as the Resistance prepares to overthrow the Order. Julia and Gervase arrive to hear the name that will destroy Mordrin.
